roadmap.feature_description: Add a version number on the start screen in the lower left corner in major.minor.patch style.

steps.name: Render version string in lower-left corner of start screen
criteria: AC1: The start screen rendered output contains a string matching the pattern 'v\d+\.\d+\.\d+'
AC2: The version string is written at row 25, col 1 (lower-left corner of a 25-row terminal)
AC3: The dungeon screen rendered output does NOT contain the version string
AC4: The version string is defined as a named constant (not a magic string inline)
steps.scenario_name: version number displayed in lower-left corner of start screen
